description: Unit: HTML parser extracts data:image base64 payloads from single tag
Unit: HTML parser extracts multiple data:image payloads and preserves deterministic ordering
Unit: malformed data:image payload is skipped and does not throw workflow-failing error
Unit: non-image data URLs are rejected by embedded extraction rules
Unit: oversized embedded image payload is skipped by existing max-size policy
Unit: cid references in HTML map only to matching inline MIME parts
Unit: unreferenced inline CID MIME parts are skipped
Unit: deterministic synthetic embedded attachment ID generation is stable across retries
Unit: deterministic embedded filename generation produces sanitized, extension-appropriate names
Workflow integration: new-ticket inbound path invokes embedded-image processing for extracted images
Workflow integration: reply path invokes embedded-image processing for extracted images
DB integration happy-path: embedded image processing creates external_files row with expected mime and size
DB integration happy-path: embedded image processing creates documents row with expected metadata
DB integration happy-path: embedded image processing creates ticket document_associations row
DB integration guard: duplicate embedded-image processing does not create duplicate file/document/association rows
DB integration guard: embedded-image failure is recorded and ticket/comment flow remains successful
Unit: Gmail source-message method returns raw MIME bytes for valid message id
Unit: Microsoft source-message method returns raw MIME bytes for valid message id
Unit: MailHog source-message path returns MIME bytes when raw source is available
Unit: MailHog source-message fallback generates deterministic RFC822 payload when raw source is absent
Action integration happy-path: process_original_email_attachment uploads .eml and creates external_files/documents rows
Action integration happy-path: process_original_email_attachment associates .eml document to ticket
Action integration guard: duplicate process_original_email_attachment invocation is idempotent
Action integration guard: provider source-message retrieval failure records failed status without duplicate artifacts
Workflow integration: new-ticket path invokes process_original_email_attachment exactly once per email
Workflow integration: reply path invokes process_original_email_attachment exactly once per email
Workflow integration guard: .eml persistence failure does not block ticket creation in new-ticket flow
Workflow integration guard: .eml persistence failure does not block comment creation in reply flow
Schema contract test: inbound email payload schema accepts isInline/content fields needed by inline-image processing
Schema contract test: event schema changes remain backward compatible with existing provider payloads
E2E: inbound email with HTML data:image results in image document visible in Ticket Documents
E2E: inbound email with CID-referenced inline image results in image document visible in Ticket Documents
E2E: inbound email creates .eml document visible in Ticket Documents for both new and reply paths
E2E guard: duplicate inbound webhook/event does not duplicate embedded image or .eml documents
